name: Rosie's Pesto
recipeIngredient: 2 Garlic cloves, peeled (may use up to 5 cloves)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the basil, garlic, pine nuts, and parmesan cheese in a blender or food processor.
2. Turn on the machine and slowly drizzle in the lemon juice while blending.
3. Continue to puree until a smooth paste is formed.
The amount of garlic you use is a matter of personal taste. Some garlic is more pungent than others, so start with 2 medium cloves and add more if desired for a stronger garlicky flavor.
Makes 3/4 cup pesto
